title: J. Worden & Sons HQ
description: Chester, VA headquarters — 4th-generation family operation since 1984. Class A Virginia Licensed General Contractor. 96% Marshall Unit Weight compaction standard on every job.

title: KFC Big Chicken Landmark Remodel
description: Los Angeles, CA — Full parking lot reconstruction and drive-through resurfacing for the KFC Big Chicken flagship location. VDOT-grade structural stone base. PG 76-22 Polymer Modified Asphalt specified for high-heat UV resistance.

title: Chicago Heavy-Duty Commercial Lot
description: Chicago, IL — Heavy-duty asphalt reconstruction with 3-inch surface course and 8-inch structural stone base for frost-heave protection. Frost index compliance per Illinois DOT standards. 96% Marshall compaction verified.

title: Kansas City Regional Distribution Center
description: Kansas City, MO — 45,000 sq ft truck court and loading dock apron. Clay soil correction with 6-inch stone base per Worden clay-stabilization standard. Full-depth reclamation and grading prior to paving.

title: Richmond VA Municipal Streetwork
description: Richmond, VA — VDOT Section 315 asphalt paving contract. Curb & gutter installation, ADA ramp compliance, and lane resurfacing. Davis-Bacon prevailing wage compliant.

title: Washington DC Federal Campus Parking
description: Washington, DC — Federal agency campus parking lot rehabilitation. SAM.gov contract. Full-depth asphalt reclamation, VDOT-grade base aggregate, and reflective thermoplastic striping.

title: Charlotte NC Fast-Food Portfolio
description: Charlotte, NC — Multi-site Taco Bell and KFC franchise paving portfolio. NCDOT-compliant specs, 2-inch surface residential upgrade to 3-inch commercial spec. Striping and ADA compliance included.
